Like, maybe a little bit of relief that I was able to pause and take a breath instead of getting swept away by everything. I guess I’d also like to feel a sense of accomplishment, like I’m actually taking steps to support myself rather than just feeling overwhelmed. It would be nice to feel a bit more in control, too, like I’m not just at the mercy of my emotions. I think if I can manage to use those techniques, it might help me feel more grounded and less anxious overall. Does that make sense? I just want to feel like I’m making progress, even if it’s small steps.
